stemHtml: What does a satellite based augmentation system (SBAS) use to improve integrity alerting to within 6 seconds if a GNSS malfunction occurs?

options.a: Up to 4 geostationary satellites are used to improve accuracy to within 1 m to 2 m horizontally and to advise of any GNSS malfunction.
options.b: At least 1 geostationary satellite is required to relay integrity and safety messages to the user.
options.c: Error signals are sent to the GNSS satellite to correct any position error.
options.d: 2 geostationary satellites are used to broadcast GNSS malfunctions using the L2 frequency, which includes an additional ranging signal to augment the signals from the GPS satellites.
